reviews.body: Two members of staff on the front desk were extremely helpful and arranged an appointment for the next day.Saw Pam the next day right on time. She was very friendly and extremely helpful. Really patient and accommodating guiding me to what would be best savings wise for me. One happy customer. Thanks.

Opened 5 Cash ISAs for family members. Did all the online checks and set up all the passwords. Received the welcome pack to say all opened and a PIN to activate to the accounts. Went in and did this. Went to go back in to put money in and none of the accounts worked. Was told I need to go into the branch with new ID for each member to open the accounts again. I had spent about 6 hours to this point setting them up. Gave up in the end. Shambles.

Requested a new savings account but to be sent the interest from my existing account. Despite giving written instructions and a phone call also told my request would be actioned. They failed to follow my instructions and I had to cancel the account. To make matters worse they sent me a cheque rather than electronic transfer unlike the other three providers I was with. Woeful administration and glacier like slow responses. Find a better financial institution.
Been with Leeds Building Society since I was a child (then Leeds and Holbeck )   Always friendly and helpful

I have been with Leeds Building Society since I was a child (formerly Leeds and Holbeck Building Society.   The still have places where you can go in and sort out your savings.  Always very friendly and trustworthy
Been with the building society since I was a young girl. Always friendly and helpful and professional    Always found them very personable and able to tailor accounts to my needs
Not great customer service slow to respond and strict on their penalties

Been with the Building society since it was Leeds and Holbeck and I was a very young child (over 60 years).  Always found them very professional and personable.  Recently went to update my accounts to the best interest ones.  Lesley was very informative and helpful at the Morley Branch
We have had 2 mortgages with Leeds BS and they are always quick, responsive and provide great customer service.
Possible confidential information breech. My phone got hacked after my mortgage broker give my details to this company. They also reduced the offer to 50%, even though I work for the NHS.
